overview.title: A Campus Designed for Excellence
overview.description: Bright Future School provides modern, well-maintained facilities that support academic learning, physical development, creative expression, and student safety across all grade levels.

items.title: Smart Classrooms
items.description: All classrooms are equipped with interactive smart boards and modern audio-visual tools to make learning engaging and effective. Each classroom is well-ventilated, spacious, and designed for focused, distraction-free learning.
items.imageAlt: Smart classroom with interactive board at Bright Future School

items.title: Science Laboratory
items.description: Our fully equipped science laboratory encourages curiosity and hands-on exploration. Students conduct experiments in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology under the close supervision of experienced science faculty.
items.imageAlt: Students conducting an experiment in the science laboratory

items.title: Computer Laboratory
items.description: A modern computer lab with up-to-date systems and reliable high-speed internet access prepares students for the digital world. Programming basics, digital literacy, and essential computer skills are taught here.
items.imageAlt: Students working in the computer laboratory

items.title: Library
items.description: Our library is a quiet sanctuary for reading, research, and self-directed learning. It houses an extensive collection of books, encyclopaedias, magazines, and reference materials suitable for all age groups.
items.imageAlt: School library with books and reading area

items.title: Playground & Sports Area
items.description: A spacious outdoor playground with well-maintained areas for cricket, football, basketball, kabaddi, and athletics. Physical education is an integral and valued part of our school programme.

items.title: School Transport
items.description: We operate a safe, punctual, and reliable school bus service covering major areas of the city. All vehicles are regularly serviced and inspected. Each bus is supervised by a trained attendant at all times.
items.imageAlt: School bus used for student transport

items.title: CCTV & Campus Security
items.description: Our entire campus operates under 24/7 CCTV surveillance. Trained security personnel manage entry and exit points to ensure student safety is never compromised during or after school hours.
items.imageAlt: CCTV security system at Bright Future School

items.title: Activity Rooms
items.description: Dedicated rooms for music, dance, art, and drama provide the space and resources for every student to explore their creative potential. These rooms are equipped with appropriate instruments and quality materials.
items.imageAlt: Students in the arts and activity room

items.title: Clean & Green Campus
items.description: We maintain a clean, green, and eco-friendly campus environment. Regular cleanliness drives, maintained gardens, and sustainable waste management practices instil environmental responsibility in all our students.
items.imageAlt: Clean and green campus at Bright Future School

items.title: Drinking Water & Sanitation
items.description: Filtered drinking water dispensers are available at multiple points across the campus. Clean and well-maintained separate sanitation facilities for boys and girls are upheld to the highest hygiene standards.
items.imageAlt: Clean sanitation and water facilities at school
